OpenGameArt explosion FX sprites — all CC0 1.0 Universal (Public Domain Dedication)
https://creativecommons.org/publicdomain/zero/1.0/
Downloaded: 2026-07-24. No attribution required; credits retained as thanks.

sinestesia-explosions-2.zip (+ extracted sinestesia/ directory)
  "2D Explosion Animations #2 | Frame by frame" — Sinestesia
  https://opengameart.org/content/2d-explosion-animations-2-frame-by-frame
  License(s) on page: CC0
  Contents: 4 flipbook sheets, 4096x4096 RGBA, 8x8 grid = 64 frames of
  512x512 each (plus Half Sized/ 2048px variants). Painterly fire +
  spark-debris explosion sequences.

stumpystrust-boom3.png
  "Explosion Sheet" — StumpyStrust
  https://opengameart.org/content/explosion-sheet
  License(s) on page: CC0
  Contents: 1024x1024 RGBA flipbook, 8x8 grid = 64 frames of 128x128.
  Rolling fireball with smoke tail-off.
